title: Kuaishou Enters the AI Interactive Content Market, Launches First Creator Recruitment
excerpt: After TikTok's internal testing of the "AI Interactive Space," Kuaishou has officially announced the launch of an "AI Interactive Content" creation feature, whi
content_html:
After TikTok's internal testing of the "AI Interactive Space," Kuaishou has officially announced the launch of an "AI Interactive Content" creation feature, which is now open to a first batch of collaborating creators, marking the competition among short video platforms extending from traditional content duration to interactive experience areas.

According to Dujia, Kuaishou's recruitment targets creators with interest or experience in AI interactive plots, AI character dialogues, and interactive lightweight applications, requiring the ability to continuously update content. Selected creators will get early access to the creation tools, directly collaborate with the platform team to refine the product, and the platform will also launch an AI interactive content co-creation plan.

AI interactive content is built on large models, allowing users to actively participate in the content's direction through text input or option selection, breaking the traditional one-way transmission model of short videos. The current mainstream forms are divided into three categories: AI character dialogues enable virtual companionship and role-playing; branching interactive plots allow users to make decisions to unlock multiple endings; and AI interactive lightweight applications integrate scenario experiences and fun tasks. Compared to regular videos, its strong revisit attribute can effectively extend user dwell time.

Industry analysts believe that Kuaishou's move is a critical step in the context of saturated competition in short video. Currently, the total user time across the network has entered a state of saturation, and the space for increasing average user time through short videos and live streams is gradually narrowing. AI interactive content adds a new set of "playable content" within the platform, upgrading from "watching videos" to "playing content," which can not only capture users' fragmented time and improve retention but also provide interaction data to improve recommendation algorithms. Additionally, this is a natural extension of Kuaishou's multimodal capabilities centered around Kuaishou's Qilin AI.

However, this field is still in its early stages, with issues such as awkward AI dialogue, homogenized plots, and immature user consumption habits yet to be resolved. As major platforms join the race, whether AI interactive content can reshape the short video ecosystem remains to be seen over time.

sentences.zh: 继抖音内测“AI互动空间”后，快手正式宣布推出“AI互动内容”创作功能，现已向首批合作创作者开放，标志着短视频平台的竞争从传统内容时长向互动体验领域延伸。

Compared to regular videos, its strong revisit attribute can effectively extend user dwell time.

sentences.zh: AI互动内容在平台内新增一套“可玩内容”，从“看视频”升级为“玩内容”，不仅可以捕捉用户的碎片时间，提高留存率，还可以提供交互数据来改进推荐算法。

sentences.zh: 此外，这是快手以麒麟AI为核心的多模态能力的自然延伸。

sentences.zh: 但该领域仍处于早期阶段，AI对话尴尬、剧情同质化、用户消费习惯不成熟等问题尚未解决。

sentences.en: As major platforms join the race, whether AI interactive content can reshape the short video ecosystem remains to be seen over time.
sentences.zh: 随着各大平台的加入，AI互动内容能否重塑短视频生态还有待时间检验。

content_html_zh:
继抖音内测“AI互动空间”后，快手正式宣布推出“AI互动内容”创作功能，现已向首批合作创作者开放，标志着短视频平台的竞争从传统内容时长向互动体验领域延伸。

据杜嘉介绍，快手的招募对象是对AI交互剧情、AI角色对话、交互轻量级应用感兴趣或有经验的创作者，要求具备持续更新内容的能力。 入选的创作者将优先使用创作工具，直接与平台团队合作完善产品，平台还将推出AI互动内容共创计划。

AI互动内容建立在大模型之上，让用户通过文字输入或选项选择主动参与内容走向，打破了短视频传统的单向传播模式。 目前主流形式分为三类：AI角色对话，实现虚拟陪伴、角色扮演；分支互动情节允许用户做出决定来解锁多个结局； AI交互轻量级应用融合场景体验和趣味任务。 与普通视频相比，其较强的重游属性可以有效延长用户停留时间。

业内分析人士认为，快手此举是在短视频竞争饱和的背景下迈出的关键一步。 目前，全网用户总时长已进入饱和状态，通过短视频、直播等方式提升平均用户时长的空间正在逐渐缩小。 AI互动内容在平台内新增一套“可玩内容”，从“看视频”升级为“玩内容”，不仅可以捕捉用户的碎片时间，提高留存率，还可以提供交互数据来改进推荐算法。 此外，这是快手以麒麟AI为核心的多模态能力的自然延伸。

但该领域仍处于早期阶段，AI对话尴尬、剧情同质化、用户消费习惯不成熟等问题尚未解决。 随着各大平台的加入，AI互动内容能否重塑短视频生态还有待时间检验。
